article_meta.title: Administration Trump says there will ‘likely be more’ American deaths in Iran before conflict ends by Max Rego - 03\/01\

reasoning: Multiple failures: the model flagged quoted language as author bias, used non-standard bias type labels, and missed clear bias in the author's prose (e.g., 'celebrated' and 'a slew of'). Some items are speculative meta-criticisms rather than concrete author-prose bias.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: Flagged text included direct quotations (e.g., Trump's 'wretched and vile' line and 'Operation Epic Fury'), violating the rule against treating quoted language as author bias.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Several flagged items were not genuine author-level bias but meta claims about coverage (source reliance, missing context) and one mislabeled 'euphemistic language' tied to an official operation name.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed clear author-prose bias such as 'Trump celebrated Khamenei’s death' (Word Choice/Spin) and the colloquial 'a slew of' describing deaths, as well as unattributed assertions about 'repeatedly crushing dissent.'
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Used labels outside the allowed set (e.g., 'Framing Bias,' 'Source Bias,' 'Euphemistic Language,' 'Uncritical Reporting') and mislabeled omissions; only 'Omission Bias' approximates 'Bias by Omission.
